message:
Disable .cargo/config.toml stack override and add subprocess deadlock test

Two related changes for debug/test build stability:

- .cargo/config.toml: Removed (git tracks deletion). This file set
  RUST_MIN_STACK=16777216 (16MB) to work around stack overflow from the
  56-variant Commands enum in debug builds. The config is preserved as
  .cargo/config.toml.disabled for reference, allowing the default stack
  size to be used unless explicitly re-enabled.

- test_subprocess_deadlock.rs: New regression test that verifies
  SubprocessBridge correctly times out when a child process spawns
  background jobs that hold stdout/stderr open. The test asserts that
  invoke() returns an error within 5 seconds rather than hanging
  indefinitely, preventing deadlocks from orphaned background processes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
